entries.summary: Phase 3: Menu Bar & Build System — Added Makefile with build/run/clean/install/lint targets and .swiftlint.yml config. Added NSStatusItem menu bar with SF Symbol 'keyboard' icon featuring Show/Hide Overlay, Restart, and Quit menu items via MenuBarController. Added app lifecycle management: activeTask storage in OverlayAppController, restart() with cancellation/reinitialization, reset() in OverlayViewModel clearing state, and hideWindow() on OverlayWindowController. Changed applicationShouldTerminateAfterLastWindowClosed to false to keep app alive when window is hidden.
top_rejection_reasons: Window leak on restart (3.3): restart() created new NSWindow without closing/hiding the old one before reassigning windowController
Stale activeLayerIndex not reset in OverlayViewModel.reset() (3.3)
lessons_learned: Lifecycle management methods need to account for all owned objects — missing a single state field (activeLayerIndex) or resource (window) causes subtle bugs
Tree-sitter Swift parser has false positives with NSMenuItem labeled initializer syntax — always verify syntax errors with swift build
Test_engineer modified source files to add test helpers (private method renaming + test accessors). This is invasive — prefer test-only initializers or @testable imports instead
Menu bar state tracking (isOverlayVisible) should eventually observe NSWindow visibility notifications for robustness against non-menu-driven hide paths
